implement.detail: SECURITY identity handoff - GET /api/app-assistant/whoami admin detection. Returns {admin:boolean} = can this caller EDIT this app, computed by the EXACT H1 follow-up-build edit gate (can(canEditApps) + loadWritable): own always, org-shared in-org ok, other-user-private/cross-org/missing -> false. Fail-closed 200 {admin:false} on ANY token failure (no/invalid/expired/revoked/epoch-stale) - never 4xx (no token-validity oracle); shares resolveAssistantApp with POST so the only non-200 is a malformed app-id (== POST, no new existence oracle); never grounds/bills/routes/widens admission; POST path byte-for-byte visitor-blind. Panel reads localStorage token defensively (cross-origin SecurityError swallowed), calls whoami once on mount, renders only a discreet inert admin badge (detect-then-ask; edit UX is H3). App edit is org-scoped (super-admin no cross-org edit) - a coherent match with H1, flagged as a policy decision for the operator/H5. Design: slices/H2/decision-memo.md

test.detail: full api lane 1548 passed / 1 pre-existing skip; web 167. whoami suite: isAppEditor unit grid (capability x writable verdict) + the route fail-closed matrix over the REAL verify chain (mongodb-memory-server) with throwing llm deps (proves no ground/route/bill), seeded org-shared app (own-org admins/super-admin true) AND private draft (only owner true; same-org admin false = the oracle-closure case); contract both branches strict-boolean. tsc(src+test) + web tsc clean, eslint 0, chokepoint clean, panel asset compiles

securityWall.detail: gitleaks clean; chokepoint clean; whoami issues NO model call (zero-token) and mounts no allowance middleware; fail-closed + oracle-free proven by the matrix + live probe; POST visitor-blindness preserved (verified by fresh + codex); no dead code (isOwnerOrgAdmin/detectOwnerOrgAdmin removed); one-way import to app-paths (no cycle, codex-confirmed)

liveVerification.detail: curl probe on the credentialed stack (slices/H2/live-probe.md), both the initial and mirror-the-gate rounds: no/invalid/cross-org token -> 200 {admin:false} (never 401), super-admin on an own-org writable app -> 200 {admin:true}, malformed app-id -> 400 == POST. Zero LLM cost (whoami is a non-LLM GET)

freshReview.detail: VERDICT: APPROVE (slices/H2/review-verdict.md) - fresh-context security review: no High/Medium/Low, 'clean, careful, oracle-aware implementation with honest tests'

codexSliceReview.detail: gpt-5.4/5.5 read-only: first pass NEEDS-WORK with 1 Medium (not fail-closed on a missing/empty owner org - super-admin got admin:true for an orphaned artifact) + 1 Low (org-admin owner-org membership oracle). BOTH closed by mirroring the H1 edit gate exactly (loadWritable) in 61c0372 - which also removed a false-offer bug (detection now == what the follow-up build will actually allow). Codex RE-review (slices/H2/codex-review-2.md): both CLOSED with file:line, no cycle, POST still visitor-blind, dead code removed, org-scoped policy coherent-with-H1. VERDICT: APPROVE

designAudit.reason: api slice; the only UI surface is the discreet inert admin badge (structurally pinned in the panel test; no user-facing flow yet - the edit-mode UX is H3)

walkthrough.detail: live-probe.md (curl transcripts of the fail-closed detection matrix on the running stack, both rounds)
